ai_overuse_note: At limit (75.0%). S007 and S024 converted to REAL_PHOTO_LICENSED pending download. S001/S008/S020 pending CC BY-SA legal review or paid stock — completion brings AI% to 60%.

fixes_applied.description: Real image curation complete. 19 candidates found across 5 scenes. Recommended candidates per scene: S001→C001-A (Hashima_Island_2023.jpg, CC BY-SA 4.0), S007→C007-A (Battle-Ship_Island_Nagasaki_Japan.jpg, CC BY 2.0), S008→C008-A (mine hoistroom 1992, CC BY-SA 4.0), S020→C020-A (Hashima_Island_ruins_1.jpg, CC BY-SA 4.0), S024→C024-A (Hashima_Island_2023.jpg crop, CC BY-SA 4.0). See assets/real_images/ for full candidate list and license notes.
IMG009 (S011a, mine tunnel) marked mandatory_human_review=true. PROMPT_008 CRITICAL flag enforced. No people rule documented.

warnings.message: AI-generated image rate is 85% (17/20). Maximum allowed by C04 contract is 75%. FIX-H1 curation complete: 19 real image candidates curated across 5 scenes. Next step: human selects candidates, confirms CC BY-SA license handling, downloads files. Post-replacement AI% target: 60% (12/20). See assets/real_images/.
IMG009 (mine scene, PROMPT_008) depicts sensitive historical subject (forced labor site). Human review gate required before generation. No people rule is CRITICAL.

images.notes: APPROVED — Batch 3 QA. Sea-level pre-dawn island establishing shot. Cold blue-black palette, Hashima silhouette visible, mist at water surface, no people, no vessels. Exceptional HOOK image. slow_pan_right 10s ready.

APPROVED_WITH_MINOR_NOTES. Post-processing required: desaturate 60-70%, darken -0.5 to -1 stop, add film grain. Director: frame ken_burns_zoom_in toward staircase (center/left), de-emphasize right-side exterior opening which reads as war-zone cityscape.

images.dual_scene_crop_note: S003 primary use: full door center, static hold. S010 secondary use: crop to vines/concrete edge (upper margins), slow_zoom_in, slightly more desaturated and cooler grade to distinguish from S003.
images.notes: APPROVED. Excellent door texture — peeling paint, ivy, rusted handle. Already near dark_documentary palette. Static 15s hold. Minimal post. DUAL-USE: also assigned to S010 (3:40-4:10) with alternate crop/motion — see dual_scene_crop_note.

APPROVED_WITH_MINOR_NOTES. MANDATORY: add 'illustrative archival simulation' caption in edit — image is convincingly realistic and must not be presented as actual historical photo. Mine headframe visible (coal mine, not general factory — thematically appropriate for Hashima). Small distant figures in far mid-ground — not identifiable, acceptable.

images.safety_audit_note: Suppressed by queue_cleanup (2026-06-27). Resolution Option A applied: aerial slot is orphaned (S007 has real photo IMG006). S009 school interior handled by IMG008 with PROMPT_S009_SCHOOL. No generation for this slot.
images.notes: SUPPRESSED. Orphaned aerial CG slot. S009 school interior is generated as IMG008.

images.attribution_text: Battle-Ship Island Nagasaki Japan (2008) by kntrty / Wikimedia Commons / CC BY 2.0
images.notes: FIX-H1 Round 3: DOWNLOADED. CC BY 2.0, no ShareAlike, commercially cleared. 1600x1200, 991.7 KB. Attribution must appear in YouTube description before publish.

images.structure_mismatch_note: Original spec: Building 30 (30号棟, residential). Curated candidate C008-A: Fourth Mine Pit Hoistroom (industrial). Check scene.json S008 scene_description before proceeding. If Building 30 required: search PIXTA/Getty for 30号棟 端島 instead.
images.sensitive_content_note: C008-A is NOT the mine tunnel (S011a/IMG009). Hoistroom exterior, 1992, no people, no forced labor context.
images.notes: APPROVED — Batch 3 QA. 9-story concrete residential apartment facade, low-angle upward view, rust staining, moss, crumbling window frames. Correct Building 30 character — NOT mine hoistroom. Structure mismatch with C008-A resolved. No people. ken_burns_zoom_in 15s ready.

APPROVED_WITH_MINOR_NOTES. Excellent classroom with desks/chairs overturned, light shafts, blackboard. Minor: destruction level is high (acceptable for Hashima); blackboard chalk not visible (safer). Post: slight desaturation from warm sepia, slow_pan_right 40s.

images.sensitive_content_reason: Depicts site associated with wartime forced labor. Must not show people, suffering, or violence — explicit or implied.
images.notes: APPROVED — FIX-M1 gate cleared on attempt 1. All 13 safety checks passed. Empty mine tunnel, wooden support timbers, zero human forms/silhouettes/shadows. Austere industrial. Human producer final review still required before assembly. RENAME COMPLETE: S010 typo corrected to S011a.

images.dual_scene_crop_note: S011b primary use: dark coal/shale surface, slow_zoom_in, cold grade. S019 secondary use: crop to moss/rust mineral surface (edge areas), static hold, +15deg warm color shift to read as concrete-rust not mine-coal.
images.notes: APPROVED. Pure coal/shale macro — zero human-coded shapes. Also confirmed as fallback for IMG009 under FIX-M1 gate. Slow_zoom_in 20s. Do not brighten. DUAL-USE: also assigned to S019 (8:30-9:00) with alternate crop/motion/color — see dual_scene_crop_note.

APPROVED_WITH_MINOR_NOTES. Strong light shafts, grand-scale ruin. External ruins in background evoke war-zone — frame slow_pan_left to favour interior light shaft. Compare with IMG014 (S017) for visual variety when Batch 2B generated.
APPROVED. Strongest image in Batch 2A. Natural desaturation, rusted bollards, dock recession ideal for slow_zoom_out 30s. Minimal post needed.
APPROVED on attempt 2. Photograph face-down — only blank yellowed paper back visible. Critical gate cleared. Shoe and can present. See assets/ai_images/generated/batch_2a/img013_regeneration_qa.json.

APPROVED on attempt 2. Concrete walls confirmed (painted/plastered), collapsed concrete ceiling, doorway visible — built structure not cave. Single light shaft, room-scale intimate. Not a mine tunnel. Static 30s hold.
APPROVED. Strong storm ruins at ocean edge — columns, crashing waves, dark clouds, cool blue-grey palette. Slow_pan_right 30s.

images.paid_stock_recommendation: PIXTA — 軍艦島 夕暮れ / Gunkanjima dusk. STRONGLY RECOMMENDED: this scene precedes the 40s Ma beat silence and has the highest emotional stakes in the video.
images.upgrade_flag_note: PIXTA dusk photo (軍艦島 夕暮れ, RF) recommended before publish — not a production blocker.
images.notes: APPROVED v2 — island completely surrounded by sea, warm amber/orange dusk sky, calm reflective water, three-band composition confirmed. Hashima battleship profile recognizable. No people, no vessels. MN-01: sky slightly vivid — apply post-process desaturation ~15-20% to align with dark_documentary grade, preserve warm tone. very_slow_pan_right 40s ready. Suitable before Ma silence.
APPROVED. Heritage plaque on crumbling concrete wall. Plaque inscription illegible (critical gate passed). Desaturated warm-cool contrast. Slow_zoom_in 40s.

APPROVED. Excellent Hashima panoramic — naturally desaturated, balanced composition, restful for 40-second Ma beat static hold. Minimal post needed. Confirm AI provenance. Hold STATIC, dissolve in/out, fade to black at end.

APPROVED. Ferry bow + empty deck confirmed (critical gate passed). Hashima Island battleship silhouette clearly visible. No people on vessel. Slow_zoom_in 30s. Apply subtle post-processing warm grade for OUTRO contemporary context.

images.selected_candidate_license: Attribution (National Land Image Information, no ShareAlike)
images.attribution_text: Aerial photograph of Hashima Island (1974) / Source: National Land Image Information (Color Aerial Photographs) / Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism of Japan
images.upgrade_note: If CC BY-SA legal review approved: upgrade to C024-A (same file as C001-A, 9248x6936, visual match 9/10, different crop).
images.notes: FIX-H1 Round 3: DOWNLOADED AND CROPPED. Japan Govt 1974 aerial, year of closure. Original 1900x2100 (1790.6 KB) saved to downloaded/. Center-cropped 16:9 (1900x1069, 422.9 KB) saved to processed/. Attribution-only, no SA, commercially cleared. Attribution verbatim in YouTube description required. Editorial: opens 2023 (S001) → closes 1974 (S024) — time-loop.

motion_graphics_entries.description: 端島 / 軍艦島 title fade-in on black
Nagasaki Port to Hashima distance animated map with text overlay 約15〜18km
Disputed labor statistics — dual-source uncertainty visualization

global_style.ai_style_reference: cinematic dark documentary, film grain, desaturated, dramatic shadows, 16:9
